• Rub pork with spices; slow cook on low 8h or oven at 300°F 4-5h.
  • Shred pork with forks.
  • Warm BBQ sauce with cannabis butter. Toss shredded pork in sauce.
  • Pile onto slider buns with coleslaw.

recipes.name: Cannabis Greek Salad
recipes.description: Fresh Greek salad with cannabis olive oil dressing.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 tomatoes wedged
  • 1 cucumber chunked
  • ½ red onion sliced
  • ½ cup Kalamata olives
  • 150g feta cubed
  • Dressing: 3 tbsp cannabis olive oil, 1 tbsp red wine vinegar, 1 tsp oregano, salt
recipes.instructions:
• Combine vegetables and olives.
  • Whisk dressing and pour over. Toss.
  • Top with feta. Serve with crusty bread.

recipes.name: Infused Tomato Bisque
recipes.description: Silky roasted tomato soup with cannabis cream.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1kg roma tomatoes halved
  • 1 onion quartered
  • 6 garlic cloves
  • 2 tbsp olive oil
  • 1 cup vegetable broth
  • ½ cup cannabis cream
  • 1 tsp sugar
  • Salt, pepper, basil
recipes.instructions:
• Roast tomatoes, onion and garlic at 400°F for 40 min.
  • Blend with broth until smooth.
  • Stir in cannabis cream and sugar; warm over low heat.
  • Season and top with fresh basil.

recipes.name: Cannabis Chicken Burrito Bowl
recipes.description: Customisable burrito bowl with cannabis lime dressing.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 chicken breasts
  • 1 tsp each cumin, chili powder, garlic powder
  • 2 cups cooked rice
  • 1 can black beans
  • 1 cup corn
  • Cannabis-lime dressing: juice of 2 limes + 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil
  • Avocado, salsa, sour cream, coriander
recipes.instructions:
• Season and grill chicken. Slice.
  • Build bowls: rice, beans, corn, chicken.
  • Drizzle with cannabis-lime dressing. Add toppings.

recipes.name: Infused Falafel Wrap
recipes.description: Crispy falafel with cannabis tahini dressing.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cans chickpeas
  • ½ onion
  • 3 garlic cloves
  • 1 tsp cumin
  • 1 tsp coriander
  • 2 tbsp flour
  • Oil for frying
  • Cannabis tahini: 3 tbsp tahini + 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil + lemon + water
  • Flatbreads, lettuce, tomato, cucumber
recipes.instructions:
• Pulse chickpeas, onion, garlic, spices and flour. Refrigerate 30 min.
  • Form balls; fry at 350°F 3-4 min.
  • Make cannabis tahini dressing.
  • Fill flatbreads with falafel, salad and dressing.

recipes.name: Cannabis Butternut Squash Soup
recipes.description: Velvety butternut squash soup with cannabis cream.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 large butternut squash halved
  • 1 onion quartered
  • 4 garlic cloves
  • 2 tbsp olive oil
  • 3 cups vegetable broth
  • ½ cup cannabis cream
  • 1 tsp nutmeg
  • Salt, pepper
  • Toasted pumpkin seeds
recipes.instructions:
• Roast squash, onion and garlic at 400°F for 45 min.
  • Blend with broth until smooth.
  • Stir in cannabis cream and nutmeg; warm gently.
  • Season and top with pumpkin seeds.

recipes.name: Infused Egg Fried Rice
recipes.description: Quick egg fried rice with cannabis sesame oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 3 cups day-old cooked rice
  • 3 eggs beaten
  • 2 tbsp cannabis sesame oil
  • 3 garlic cloves
  • 1 cup frozen peas
  • 4 tbsp soy sauce
  • Spring onions, sesame seeds
recipes.instructions:
• Stir-fry rice in regular oil until slightly crispy.
  • Push aside; scramble eggs.
  • Add garlic and peas; toss everything. Add soy sauce.
  • Off heat: drizzle cannabis sesame oil. Garnish.

recipes.name: Cannabis Grilled Salmon
recipes.description: Pan-seared salmon with cannabis herb butter.
recipes.ingredients:
• 4 salmon fillets
  • 2 tbsp cannabis butter
  • 2 garlic cloves minced
  • 1 tbsp fresh dill
  • Zest and juice of 1 lemon
  • Salt, pepper
  • Capers and lemon to serve
recipes.instructions:
• Season salmon and sear skin-side down 4 min until crispy.
  • Flip; cook 3 more min.
  • Melt cannabis butter with garlic and dill; spoon over fish.
  • Serve with capers and lemon.

recipes.name: Infused Caprese Salad
recipes.description: Classic caprese with cannabis extra virgin olive oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 3 large ripe tomatoes sliced
  • 250g fresh mozzarella sliced
  • 1 bunch fresh basil
  • 3 tbsp cannabis extra virgin olive oil
  • 1 tbsp balsamic glaze
  • Flaky sea salt, black pepper
recipes.instructions:
• Arrange alternating tomato and mozzarella slices.
  • Tuck basil leaves between.
  • Drizzle with cannabis olive oil and balsamic.
  • Finish with sea salt and pepper.

recipes.name: Cannabis Quesadilla
recipes.description: Crispy quesadilla cooked in cannabis butter.
recipes.ingredients:
• 4 large flour tortillas
  • 2 tbsp cannabis butter
  • 2 cups shredded cheddar
  • 1 cup cooked chicken or black beans
  • ½ red onion diced
  • 1 jalapeño sliced
  • Sour cream and guacamole
recipes.instructions:
• Melt cannabis butter in a large pan.
  • Place tortilla; scatter cheese, filling and jalapeño over half.
  • Fold and cook 3 min per side until golden.
  • Cut into wedges and serve.

recipes.name: Infused Pad Thai
recipes.description: Classic Pad Thai with cannabis sesame oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 200g flat rice noodles soaked
  • 2 eggs
  • 150g shrimp or tofu
  • 2 tbsp cannabis sesame oil
  • 3 tbsp soy sauce
  • 2 tbsp tamarind paste
  • 1 tbsp sugar
  • Spring onions, bean sprouts, peanuts, lime
recipes.instructions:
• Stir-fry shrimp or tofu. Scramble eggs in same pan.
  • Add noodles, soy sauce, tamarind and sugar. Toss 2 min.
  • Add spring onions and bean sprouts.
  • Off heat: drizzle cannabis sesame oil. Serve with peanuts and lime.

recipes.name: Cannabis Pizza
recipes.description: Homemade pizza with cannabis olive oil in the dough and drizzled on top.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cups flour
  • 1 tsp instant yeast
  • ½ tsp salt
  • ¾ cup warm water
  • 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil
  • Toppings: ½ cup tomato sauce, 150g mozzarella, toppings of choice
  • Extra cannabis olive oil to finish
recipes.instructions:
• Mix dough; knead 8 min. Rise 1h.
  • Preheat oven to 475°F.
  • Stretch dough; add sauce, cheese and toppings.
  • Bake 10-12 min until golden.
  • Drizzle with cannabis olive oil before slicing.

recipes.name: Infused Lentil Dal
recipes.description: Fragrant Indian dal finished with cannabis ghee.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1½ cups red lentils
  • 1 onion
  • 4 garlic cloves
  • 1 inch ginger
  • 1 can crushed tomatoes
  • 1 tsp cumin seeds
  • 1 tsp turmeric
  • 1 tsp garam masala
  • 3 cups water
  • 2 tbsp cannabis ghee
  • Salt, coriander
recipes.instructions:
• Fry cumin seeds until they pop. Add onion, garlic and ginger.
  • Add tomatoes and spices. Add lentils and water; simmer 20-25 min.
  • Off heat: stir in cannabis ghee.
  • Season and garnish with coriander. Serve over rice.

recipes.name: Cannabis Feijoada
recipes.description: Brazil’s beloved black bean and pork stew, slow-cooked and finished with cannabis olive oil for a hearty, infused twist on the national dish.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cups dried black beans, soaked overnight
  • 200g smoked pork ribs
  • 150g dried beef (carne seca), soaked and diced
  • 150g pork sausage (linguica), sliced
  • 100g bacon, diced
  • 1 large onion, chopped
  • 6 garlic cloves, minced
  • 3 bay leaves
  • Salt and black pepper to taste
  • 3 tbsp cannabis olive oil
  • Orange slices for garnish
recipes.instructions:
• Drain beans, cover with fresh water, add smoked ribs and bay leaves. Simmer 1.5–2 hours until beans are tender.
  • In a skillet, cook bacon until crispy. Add sausage, dried beef, onion and garlic; sauté 5 min.
  • Transfer skillet contents to bean pot. Simmer 30 min more.
  • Remove from heat and stir in cannabis olive oil.
  • Serve over white rice with sautéed collard greens, farofa and orange slices.

recipes.name: Infused Brigadeiro
recipes.description: Classic Brazilian chocolate truffles made with condensed milk, cocoa and cannabutter — rolled in chocolate sprinkles for a sweet, potent treat.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 can (14 oz) sweetened condensed milk
  • 2 tbsp unsweetened cocoa powder
  • 1 tbsp cannabutter
  • Pinch of salt
  • Chocolate sprinkles for rolling
recipes.instructions:
• Combine condensed milk, cocoa powder and cannabutter in a saucepan over medium-low heat.
  • Stir constantly until the mixture thickens and pulls away from the sides of the pan, about 10–15 min.
  • Transfer to a greased plate and let cool to room temperature.
  • Grease your hands with butter, roll into small balls and coat in chocolate sprinkles.
  • Place in mini cupcake liners and refrigerate until firm.

recipes.name: Cannabis Paçoca
recipes.description: Crumbly Brazilian peanut candy infused with cannabutter — a sweet and nutty edible that melts in your mouth.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cups roasted unsalted peanuts
  • 1 cup sugar
  • 1 tbsp cannabutter, melted
  • Pinch of salt
recipes.instructions:
• Pulse peanuts in a food processor until you get a fine, slightly oily crumb.
  • Add sugar, melted cannabutter and salt. Pulse a few more times until combined.
  • Press mixture firmly into small cylindrical molds or a lined baking pan.
  • Refrigerate 1 hour until set, then unmold.
  • Store in an airtight container at room temperature.

recipes.name: Infused Coxinha
recipes.description: Brazil’s iconic teardrop-shaped chicken croquettes, made with cannabis-infused dough for a savory, crispy edible.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cups shredded cooked chicken
  • 1 tbsp cream cheese
  • 2 cups chicken broth
  • 2 tbsp cannabutter
  • 2 cups all-purpose flour
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 2 eggs, beaten
  • Breadcrumbs for coating
  • Oil for deep frying
recipes.instructions:
• Season shredded chicken with cream cheese, salt and pepper. Set aside.
  • In a saucepan, bring broth and cannabutter to a boil. Add flour all at once, stirring vigorously until dough forms a ball. Let cool.
  • Take a portion of dough, flatten in your palm, add chicken filling, and shape into a teardrop.
  • Dip in beaten egg, then roll in breadcrumbs.
  • Deep fry at 350°F until golden brown, about 3–4 min. Drain on paper towels.

recipes.name: Cannabis Pão de Queijo
recipes.description: Chewy, cheesy Brazilian bread rolls made with tapioca flour and cannabis olive oil — naturally gluten-free and irresistibly good.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 cups tapioca flour (polvilho azedo)
  • ½ cup milk
  • ¼ cup cannabis olive oil
  • 1 egg
  • 1 cup grated Parmesan or Minas cheese
  • ½ tsp salt
recipes.instructions:
• Preheat oven to 375°F.
  • Heat milk, cannabis olive oil and salt until just simmering. Pour over tapioca flour and stir until combined.
  • Let cool slightly, then mix in egg and cheese until smooth.
  • Roll into small balls and place on a lined baking sheet.
  • Bake 20–25 min until puffed and golden.

recipes.name: Infused Açaí Bowl
recipes.description: A refreshing Brazilian açaí bowl blended with cannabis coconut oil and topped with granola, banana and honey.
recipes.ingredients:
• 2 packs (200g) frozen açaí puree
  • 1 frozen banana
  • ½ cup almond milk
  • 1 tbsp cannabis coconut oil, melted
  • Toppings: granola, sliced banana, strawberries, honey, shredded coconut
recipes.instructions:
• Blend frozen açaí puree, frozen banana, almond milk and cannabis coconut oil until thick and smooth.
  • Pour into a bowl.
  • Top with granola, sliced banana, strawberries, shredded coconut and a drizzle of honey.
  • Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Cannabis Moqueca
recipes.description: A rich Brazilian fish stew with coconut milk, tomatoes, peppers and dendê oil, finished with cannabis olive oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 500g firm white fish (cod or halibut), cut into chunks
  • Juice of 2 limes
  • 1 onion, sliced into rings
  • 1 bell pepper, sliced
  • 2 tomatoes, chopped
  • 1 can (400ml) coconut milk
  • 2 tbsp dendê (palm) oil
  • 2 tbsp cannabis olive oil
  • Fresh cilantro, salt and pepper
recipes.instructions:
• Marinate fish in lime juice, salt and pepper for 30 min.
  • In a clay pot or deep pan, layer onion, peppers, tomatoes and fish.
  • Pour coconut milk and dendê oil over the top. Cover and simmer 20 min without stirring.
  • Remove from heat and gently stir in cannabis olive oil.
  • Garnish with cilantro. Serve over white rice.

recipes.name: Infused Tapioca Crepe
recipes.description: A popular Brazilian street food — crispy tapioca crepes filled with cheese and coconut, drizzled with cannabis coconut oil.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 cup hydrated tapioca starch (goma de tapioca)
  • Pinch of salt
  • Filling: shredded coconut, mozzarella or coalho cheese
  • 1 tbsp cannabis coconut oil
  • Sweetened condensed milk (optional)
recipes.instructions:
• Sift tapioca starch through a fine sieve to remove lumps.
  • Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Spread a thin layer of tapioca starch evenly across the pan.
  • When it turns translucent and holds together (about 1 min), add cheese and coconut to one half.
  • Fold and cook 1 min more until cheese melts.
  • Drizzle cannabis coconut oil and condensed milk on top. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Cannabis Beijinho
recipes.description: Sweet Brazilian coconut truffles made with condensed milk and cannabutter, rolled in shredded coconut — brigadeiro’s coconut cousin.
recipes.ingredients:
• 1 can (14 oz) sweetened condensed milk
  • 1 tbsp cannabutter
  • ½ cup shredded coconut, plus more for rolling
  • Pinch of salt
  • Whole cloves for decoration
recipes.instructions:
• Combine condensed milk, cannabutter and shredded coconut in a saucepan over medium-low heat.
  • Stir constantly until mixture thickens and pulls away from the sides, about 10–12 min.
  • Transfer to a greased plate and cool to room temperature.
  • Roll into small balls and coat in shredded coconut. Top each with a clove.
  • Place in mini cupcake liners and refrigerate until ready to serve.

recipes.name: Infused Empadão
recipes.description: A large Brazilian savory pie with a cannabis-infused buttery crust, filled with seasoned chicken, olives and hearts of palm.
recipes.ingredients:
• 3 cups all-purpose flour
  • ½ cup cannabutter, cold and cubed
  • ½ cup regular butter, cold and cubed
  • 2 egg yolks
  • 3–4 tbsp ice water
  • Filling: 2 cups shredded chicken, 1 onion, 2 garlic cloves, ½ cup green olives, ½ cup hearts of palm, 2 tbsp tomato paste, salt, pepper, parsley
  • 1 egg for egg wash
recipes.instructions:
• Make dough: pulse flour, cannabutter, regular butter and egg yolks in a food processor. Add ice water until dough comes together. Wrap and refrigerate 30 min.
  • Make filling: sauté onion and garlic, add chicken, tomato paste, olives, hearts of palm, salt, pepper and parsley. Cook 5 min. Let cool.
  • Press ⅔ of dough into a greased pie dish. Add filling.
  • Roll remaining dough for top crust. Seal edges and brush with egg wash.
  • Bake at 375°F for 35–40 min until golden.
